data_source: Historical accumulated (352 resolved trades) + A/B rule analysis (99 rules, 82 pending graduation) — no live trades since 2026-04-23
note: Edge data is historical. Bot offline ~15d. Restart bot to refresh. Stale 56.9h from last live-data run.

high_edges.note: ETH_SELL_BB = 70% WR, trending-ETH avg +$9.49. Tier-1 BB golden setup (BB_solo = 67.6% WR). Awaiting live data for graduation.
BTC_BUY_BB = 69% WR. Second-best BB setup. SOL_BUY_BB = 67% WR (third). BB solo overall 67.6% WR vs ensemble 51.9%.
BB firing ALONE (without MTQ agreement) = 67.6% WR. BB+MTQ co-agreement = 35% WR (anti-pattern). Solo BB is +EV; consensus with MTQ is -EV.
